_comment: MonMS staging config — gitignored (see site/.gitignore). Commit config.example.json only.

_fieldDocs.siteUrl: Public URL of this MonMS instance, no trailing slash. Shown in the serve startup banner. Example: https://staging.example.com
_fieldDocs.productionUrl: HTTPS origin of the live production site, no trailing slash. Used by Publish to live — not the running instance URL.
_fieldDocs.publisherEmails: PocketBase superuser emails allowed to open /_monms/publish. Create users at /_/ first, then list their emails here.
_fieldDocs.allowedHosts: Hostnames passed to monms serve as --origins when the CLI flag is omitted. CLI --origins always wins. Example: staging.example.com
_fieldDocs.bind: Listen address for monms serve as --http when the CLI flag is omitted. CLI --http always wins. Example: { "host": "0.0.0.0", "port": "8090" }
_fieldDocs.logging: Optional. File log levels under .monms/logs/. Omit to use build-mode defaults (production binary: error, warn, schema; development binary: all levels). ERROR is always written. Values: error, warn, info, debug, schema.
_fieldDocs.loggingRotation: Optional lumberjack rotation for log files. Example: { "maxSizeMB": 10, "maxBackups": 5, "maxAgeDays": 30, "compress": true }
_fieldDocs.devLogging: Not stored in config.json. Verbose PocketBase console/SQL logs: run monms serve --dev (CLI flag only).
_fieldDocs.shapeSync: Optional shape sync at serve startup: fetch tags and checkout ref (not git pull). Example: { "enabled": true, "ref": "v1.2.0", "remote": "origin", "force": false, "failOnError": false }
